compiled_state.title: brainstorm no-arg list highlights scrutiny-gap epics (children without tag)
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
As a practitioner running /dso:brainstorm with no arguments, I want to see decomposed-but-unbrainstormed epics highlighted so that I can close the scrutiny gap on high-value work.

## Done Definition
- brainstorm SKILL.md "When invoked without a ticket ID" block is extended
- After running the existing `sprint-list-epics.sh --max-children=0` call, additionally fetch open epics with children that lack `brainstorm:complete` (scrutiny-gap set)
- Present the combined list with two labeled categories: zero-child epics (existing) AND scrutiny-gap epics (new category labeled as "scrutiny gap — decomposed, not yet brainstormed")
- Selecting an epic from either category proceeds through the brainstorm flow as if invoked with that ID
- Fixture test: no-arg invocation shows both categories; scrutiny-gap epics are clearly distinguished and selectable

## Considerations
- [Maintainability] Use the --has-tag flag from Story b8f4-02a9 (negation pattern or post-filter) to identify tag-less epics with children
- [Testing] Behavioral test — assert output structure and that scrutiny-gap entries are surfaced

## Escalation Policy
Escalate when blocked.
